metadata.title: Turning a 2v1 on Valorant’s Haven with Sharp Timing and Smart Angles
metadata.description:
Watch this intense 2v1 on Haven where precise peeks and steady aim swing the round. Notice the clever positioning that makes all the difference.
What’s your favorite spot to clutch on Haven?
Share your own plays below!

Let me know your best clutch moment in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #clutch #fps
